summary: Iteration 225 — Critical pre-launch sprint: all 27 backend tests passed. Fixed FarewellMobilePage svc.desc TypeError bug. Verified: emergentagent.com URL blocking, admin AI prompt pre-fill+editable, /api/mira/plan Claude Haiku (4 cards), life-stage puppy filter, breed isolation, service price removal, farewell services API fetch.

minor.issue: Dead code after return statement at line 661 (service/bundle enrichment never runs). Also 'layer3_count' in dir() should be 'layer3_count' in locals() — cosmetic, works in practice.

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: svc.desc.replace(/{name}/g, petName) — TypeError when API services loaded (API uses 'description' not 'desc'), causing 'Oops! Something went wrong' React error boundary on Get Support tab

critical_code_review_comments: mira_score_engine.py lines 662-680: Dead code after return on line 661 (service/bundle enrichment block never executes). This may mean claude-picks picks are returned without enrichment data — check if picks need enrichment.
isValidUrl() in ProductCard.jsx also blocks 'static.prod-images' CDN — confirmed intentional

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI checks passed after FarewellMobilePage fix)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 225 features verified: (1) POST /api/admin/cleanup-broken-images returns {success:true, cleaned:{products_master_image_cleaned:N,...}} - PASS. (2) POST /api/admin/sync-image-fields returns {success:true, synced:{breed_products_synced:N, products_master_synced:N}} - PASS. (3) POST /api/mira/plan with pet_id=pet-mojo-7327ad56 & pillar=play returns 4 Claude cards with {icon,title,reason,action,concierge} shape - PASS. (4) Life-stage puppy filter: Mojo (adult Indie) claude-picks contain ZERO puppy products - PASS. (5) Breed isolation: Mojo claude-picks contain ZERO Labrador/Akita/Corgi products - PASS. (6) Service box APIs: /api/service-box/services?pillar=emergency and ?pillar=farewell both return 200 with services array (20 farewell services found). (7) EMERG_SERVICES and FAREWELL_SERVICES hardcoded arrays have no prices - PASS. (8) AIImagePromptField shows pre-filled prompt 'Festive product photo of [ProductName], pet celebration item, pastel balloons...' based on product name/pillar - PASS (tested on Akita · Designer Bandana product in Media tab). (9) Prompt field is editable - PASS. (10) Generate with AI button visible and enabled - PASS. (11) Reset button visible - PASS. (12) Warning 'This product already has an image' shown when currentImageUrl exists - PASS. BUG FIXED: FarewellMobilePage.jsx line 264 svc.desc → (svc.desc || svc.description || '') to prevent TypeError when API services used. EmergencyMobilePage already handled this correctly (uses svc.desc || svc.description || ''). Note: /api/mira/plan previously returned 404 (fallback) - now returns real Claude Haiku responses with 4 cards.
